creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
With the import of ACPI-CA 20090521 [1] the original issue is gone,
so this PR can be closed.

[1] http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-acpi/2009-June/005780.html
-- 
Eygene
